zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Robert Crichton 5th of Sanquhar於大約1409年出生在蘇格蘭度福利爾桑哈爾時，他的父親Robert Crichton - 4th Laird of Sanquhar34歲，母親Elizabeth Erskine25歲。他和Elizabeth Ann de Erskine Baroness Gibson至少有13個兒子和6個女兒。他在英國蘇格蘭度福利爾被列為sheriff of dumfrieshire 。他去世於1478年10月17日在他的家鄉享年70歲，埋葬在蘇格蘭度福利爾桑哈爾。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Robert Crichton 5th of Sanquhar于大约1409年出生在苏格兰度福利爾桑哈爾时，他的父亲Robert Crichton - 4th Laird of Sanquhar34岁，母亲Elizabeth Erskine25岁。他和Elizabeth Ann de Erskine Baroness Gibson至少有13个儿子和6个女儿。他在英国苏格兰度福利爾被列为sheriff of dumfrieshire 。他去世于1478年10月17日在他的家乡享年70岁，埋葬在苏格兰度福利爾桑哈爾。

nameMeanings.name: Crichton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Creighton
meanings: Scottish and Irish: habitational name from Crichton, near Edinburgh, first recorded c. 1128 in the form Crectune, in 1287 as Crecton, and in 1360 as Creychtona. The name is probably an early hybrid compound of Old Welsh creic ‘rock’ + Older Scots tun ‘farm, settlement’ (Old English tūn). In Ireland and Britain, this form of the name is now found chiefly in northern Ireland; the more usual Scottish forms are Crichton and Crighton .
Irish: sometimes used for Gaelic Ó Creacháin or Ó Criocháin (see Crehan ).
English: habitational name from Creighton in Staffordshire, named with Celtic creig ‘rock’ + Old English tūn ‘settlement’.

nameMeanings.name: Robert
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the many French names of Germanic origin that were introduced into Britain by the Normans; it has since remained in continuous use. It is derived from the nearly synonymous elements hrōd ‘fame’ + berht ‘bright, famous’, and had a native Old English predecessor of similar form (Hreodbeorht), which was supplanted by the Norman name. Two dukes of Normandy in the 11th century bore the name: the father of William the Conqueror (sometimes identified with the legendary Robert the Devil), and his eldest son. It was borne also by three kings of Scotland, notably Robert the Bruce ( 1274–1329 ), who freed Scotland from English domination. The altered short form Bob is very common, but Hob and Dob, which were common in the Middle Ages and gave rise to surnames, are extinct. See also Rupert .

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Robert Crichton 5th of Sanquhar was born about 1409, in Sanquhar, Dumfriesshire, Scotland, his father, Robert Crichton - 4th Laird of Sanquhar, was 34 and his mother, Elizabeth Erskine, was 25. He had at least 13 sons and 6 daughters with Elizabeth Ann de Erskine Baroness Gibson. His occupation is listed as sheriff of dumfrieshire  in Dumfriesshire, Scotland, United Kingdom. He died on 17 October 1478, in his hometown, at the age of 70, and was buried in Sanquhar, Dumfriesshire, Scotland.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Robert Crichton 5th of Sanquhar est né environ 1409, à Sanquhar, Dumfriesshire, Écosse, son père, Robert Crichton - 4th Laird of Sanquhar, avait 34 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth Erskine, avait 25 ans. Il a eu au moins 13 fils et 6 filles avec Elizabeth Ann d’Erskine Baroness Gibson. Sa profession de son indiquée est sheriff of dumfrieshire  à Dumfriesshire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni. Il est décédé le 17 octobre 1478, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 70 ans, et a été enterré à Sanquhar, Dumfriesshire, Écosse.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Robert Crichton 5th of Sanquhar um 1409 in Sanquhar, Dumfriesshire, Scotland geboren wurde, war sein Vater Robert Crichton - 4th Laird of Sanquhar 34 und seine Mutter Elizabeth Erskine 25. Er hatte mit Elizabeth Ann de Erskine Baroness Gibson mindestens 13 Söhne und 6 Töchter. sein Beruf ist als sheriff of dumfrieshire  in Dumfriesshire, Schottland, United Kingdom aufgeführt. Er starb am 17. Oktober 1478 im Alter von 70 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Sanquhar, Dumfriesshire, Scotland begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Robert Crichton 5th of Sanquhar è nato il circa 1409 nel Sanquhar, Dumfriesshire, Scotland, il suo padre, Robert Crichton - 4th Laird of Sanquhar, aveva 34 anni e il suo madre, Elizabeth Erskine, aveva 25 anni. Lui avuto almeno 13 figli e 6 figlie con Elizabeth Ann de Erskine Baroness Gibson. La sua occupazione è indicata come sheriff of dumfrieshire  nel Dumfriesshire, Scozia, Regno Unito. Morì il 17 ottobre 1478, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 70 anni, e fu sepolto a Sanquhar, Dumfriesshire, Scotland.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Robert Crichton 5th of Sanquharが約1409年にスコットランドダムフリーシュアイアサンクハーで生まれた時，父Robert Crichton - 4th Laird of Sanquharは34歳，母Elizabeth Erskineは25歳であった。彼はElizabeth Ann de Erskine Baroness Gibsonとの間に少なくとも13人の息子と6人の娘をもうけた。イギリススコットランドダムフリーシュアイアでの職業はsheriff of dumfrieshire と記録されている。彼は1478年10月17日に故郷で70歳で死去し，スコットランドダムフリーシュアイアサンクハーにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Robert Crichton 5th of Sanquhar(이)가 대략 1409년 스컷랜드 드프리실르 산크하르에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Robert Crichton - 4th Laird of Sanquhar(은)는 34세였고, 그의 어머니 Elizabeth Erskine(은)는 25세였다. 그는 Elizabeth Ann de Erskine Baroness Gibson(와)과 적어도 열 명 이상의 아들과 여섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그의 직업은 영국 스코틀랜드 드프리실르에서 sheriff of dumfrieshire 이었다. 그는 1478년 10월 17일 그의 고향에서 70세의 나이로 사망했으며 스컷랜드 드프리실르 산크하르에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Robert Crichton 5th of Sanquhar nasceu aproximadamente 1409, em Sanquhar, Dumfriesshire, Scotland, seu pai, Robert Crichton - 4th Laird of Sanquhar, tinha 34 anos e sua mãe, Elizabeth Erskine, tinha 25 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 13 filhos e 6 filhas com Elizabeth Ann de Erskine Baroness Gibson. Sua profissão aparece como sheriff of dumfrieshire  em Dumfriesshire, Escócia, United Kingdom. Ele faleceu em 17 de outubro de 1478, em sua cidade natal, com 70 anos, e foi sepultado em Sanquhar, Dumfriesshire, Scotland.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Robert Crichton 5th of Sanquhar родился около 1409 г. в местности санкухар, думфриессхир, Шотландия, его отцу по имени Robert Crichton - 4th Laird of Sanquhar было 34 года, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth Erskine, 25. У него было по крайней мере 13 сыновей и 6 дочерей от Elizabeth Ann de Erskine Baroness Gibson.  Он работал по профессии sheriff of dumfrieshire  в местности думфриессхир, Шотландия, Великобритания. Он умер 17 октября 1478 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 70 лет и был похоронен в местности санкухар, думфриессхир, Шотландия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir Robert Crichton 5th of Sanquhar nació aproximadamente 1409, en Sanquhar, Dumfriesshire, Scotland, su papá, Robert Crichton - 4th Laird of Sanquhar, tenía 34 años y su mamá, Elizabeth Erskine, tenía 25 años. Tuvo por lo menos 13 hijos y 6 hijas con Elizabeth Ann de Erskine Baroness Gibson. Su ocupación registrada era sheriff of dumfrieshire  en Dumfriesshire, Escocia, Reino Unido. Murió el 17 de octubre de 1478, en su pueblo, a la edad de 70 años, y fue sepultado en Sanquhar, Dumfriesshire, Scotland.
